calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-27-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Edward Frey
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mason Martinez, Esq. 650-345-6811 Cattermole Law Group for Plaintiff.
Danielle Cruz, Esq. 916-565-2900, 916-213-8744 GOrdon Rees Scully Mansukani for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Martinez submits on the papers. Ms. Cruz argues the issuance of sanctions, states Plaintiff is agreeable to waiving sanctions and no further objections to the tentative. The Court admomnishes counsel. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF RENEE MARTINEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Edward Frey.

Plaintiff Renee Martinez's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admissions, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Edward Frey, Request for Monetary Sanctions is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Edward Frey
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RENEE MARTINEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Edward Frey.

Continued to September 17, 2025, on the court's motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
